TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sandimen Itini i Pingtung ko Sandimen Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 185.9 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 94.02 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 85.25 km²), 7,698 ko tamdaw i Sandimen Siyang, 2,296 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 7,320 a tamdaw, pakaala to 95%(Paiwan, Rukai) no polong no tamdaw. o Paiwan, Rukai ko sa'alomanay i Pingtung. O kasaniyarona 10 ko cun, 12 ko niyaro' i Sandimen Siyang. Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan .
S.PHON: sanɬ~ɮimən itini i piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u sanɬ~ɮimən sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.* km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u **.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i sanɬ~ɮimən sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(paiwan, ro~u~ukai) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u paiwan, ro~u~ukai ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i piŋto~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i sanɬ~ɮimən sijaŋ. timo~u~ur , tjab~vatjab~vaŋ , b~vaɾjo~u~uɾo~u~u , pariɬ~ɮrajan , sa*aran , taɾamakao~u~u , ʦab~vak , ɬ~ɮjinəɾjəpan , tjaiɾjakiŋ , kiŋɬ~ɮaɾro~u~uwanə , tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj , tjo~u~usəpajo~u~uan .
S.FORM: Sandimen Itini i Pingtung ko Sandimen Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 185.9 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 94.02 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 85.25 km²), 7,698 ko tamdaw i Sandimen Siyang, 2,296 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 7,320 a tamdaw, pakaala to 95%(Paiwan, Rukai) no polong no tamdaw. o Paiwan, Rukai ko sa'alomanay i Pingtung. O kasaniyarona 10 ko cun, 12 ko niyaro' i Sandimen Siyang. Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan .
S.PHON: sanɬ~ɮimən itini i piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u sanɬ~ɮimən sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.* km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u **.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i sanɬ~ɮimən sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(paiwan, ro~u~ukai) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u paiwan, ro~u~ukai ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i piŋto~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i sanɬ~ɮimən sijaŋ. timo~u~ur , tjab~vatjab~vaŋ , b~vaɾjo~u~uɾo~u~u , pariɬ~ɮrajan , sa*aran , taɾamakao~u~u , ʦab~vak , ɬ~ɮjinəɾjəpan , tjaiɾjakiŋ , kiŋɬ~ɮaɾro~u~uwanə , tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj , tjo~u~usəpajo~u~uan .
